name: Crawfish Fritters
recipeInstructions:
1. Add pimientos and green onions to crawfish tails.
2. Sift flour, baking soda, and salt together.
3. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the crawfish mixture.
4. Slowly incorporate broth or water until a thick batter forms.
5. Cover and let rest for 30 minutes.
6. Heat oil in a deep fryer or heavy pot to at least 350°F (175°C).
7. Drop spoonfuls of batter into the hot oil, turning occasionally, until golden brown.
8. Remove fritters from oil using a slotted spoon and drain on paper towels.
